programme.desc: Abraham decide confesar a sus compañeros el romance entre Arantxa y Fernando. El grupo se divide para pasar la tarde en el gimnasio y en la peluquería. Luego en la casa, Arantxa vive un momento muy intenso

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa después de la disco Arantxa se enfrenta intensamente a Elettra mientras Abraham se enfada mucho con Mane porque cree que esta se ríe de su amiga española

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Nuestros Shores siguen conociendo Madrid. Tras unos momentos picantes durante una típica siesta española, dan un paseo por el centro de la capital.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Sigue el conflicto entre Igor y Arantxa, y también entre Abraham y Elettra por un bofetón de camino a casa donde la fiesta continúa. Mientras tanto uno de los mexicanos sufre un accidente que lo llevará directo al hospital

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mientras Esteban está en la habitación del amor dos de sus invitadas provocan un conflicto en la casa. Lo que en principio era una fiesta de risas y cachondeo se convierte en una guerra donde el joven acabará perdiendo los estribos

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Cuando todo era paz y armonía la llegada de la Boss, hará poner las pilas a los chicos antes de que vayan a pasar un día de campo. Con los chicos cansados de pasar un día en el campo llega una nueva fuente de energía, Potro vuelve al grupo

programme.desc: Andrew Duggan guest stars as Justin Bainbridge, a multimillionaire paranoid militarist, whose son, Howard, defected behind the Iron Curtain with the formula to a lethal nerve gas he had developed in "A Ghost Story"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An F.B.I. man is blinded while investigating a crime syndicate attempting to take over a large chemical plant. Jim Phelps undergoes a delicate eye operation so as to appear convincingly blind when he poses as the sightless man.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as an aging hoodlum who is artificially transplanted back to the 1930s and the scene of his unsolved crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest stars Gerald S. O'Loughlin and Christopher Stone portray crime syndicate bosses in charge of the waterfront who extort huge sums of money from every ship docking at a west coast port.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest star Kevin McCarthy plays the role of a highly-placed Defense Department advisor who has murdered an Air Force official and sold vital top-secret material about America's nuclear defenses to foreign powers.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of the night and day skies. He plays with a star on a string and then remembers his trip to Moscow, where he met Russian children's television program producers. There is a pretend star falling from a string.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Russian children's television host Tatiana Vedeneeva vists Mister Rogers and takes out a puppet from her program -- Stepashka, a very brave rabbit. In the Neighborhood, a visitor from the stars lands at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister McFeely delivers the wrong video tape. Mister Rogers reassures Mr. McFeely by singing You Are Special. King Friday is angry and belittles Miss Paulificate when she mistakenly delivers garden hoes instead of garden hose.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Eric Kloss visit a cavern led by Betty Aberlin. Inside the cavern, Mr. Kloss plays his saxophone while Mister Rogers plays an organ. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday hires a tutor for Prince Tuesday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett stops by along with three students who demonstrate their jump roping skills. Lady Aberlin encourages Prince Tuesday to tell his father he wants to stay at Someplace Else School.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Riding their bicycles to the Scanlons' home, Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely discover that the house is built into the side of a hill. Mr. McFeely has a sand delivery that Mayor Maggie may have ordered for a secret project in Westwood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers follows a scavenger hunt that leads to balloon artist, Bruce Franco. Lady Aberlin has a balloon and King Friday wonders what would happen if the air went out of it. Lady Aberlin encourages him to enjoy it and not worry.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers writes with invisible ink. Mr. McFeely delivers a heavy marble statue. Lady Elaine Fairchilde looks forward to her marriage to Neighbor Aber while Ana Platypus says that she is going to marry Daniel Striped Tiger.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers tries to draw a picture with his eyes closed, but it doesn't turn out well. He visits Crist Delmonico, a blind artist who can visualize his artwork in his mind. King Friday announces that Queen Ida is coming to visit.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers deciphers an invisible ink note from Mr. McFeely and shows a video of how people make suitcases.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers enters wearing a reindeer hat complete with antlers. King Friday declares that everyone in the Neighborhood must wear at hat. Andy Holiner and Alice Johnson sing with some young friends.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a basket from a Native American friend who keeps it near his door for friends to "put burdens here and come inside." Bob Dog invites King Friday to join their game, a first such invitation for the king.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: La Edad de los grandes felinos

programme.title: La Edad de los grandes felinos
programme.desc: ¿Qué cambios ha tenido la Tierra desde los ojos del puma y el leopardo? Desde la prácticamente desaparición de la vida salvaje americana al auge del hombre y las áreas industrializadas y urbanas del siglo XXI.

programme.title: Gigantes

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Es como una reunión cuando la policía alcanza a alguien que reconoce. La amante de un hombre hace problemas con la esposa. Los oficiales batallan con dos sospechosos que no dan respuestas concretas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre buscado huye y la policía va muy cerca detrás de él. La policía persigue a una persona manejando nerviosamente. Un retén arriesga a un auto lleno de gente que tiene mucho que ocultar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales se ven obligados a usar guantes cuando detienen a un sospechoso asustado con una condición grave de la piel. Un futuro papá trata de correr. Un rapero empieza a cantar cuando lo esposan.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se somete a un hombre que está convencido que un animal salvaje lo sigue. Un cumpleaños se descontrola rápidamente cuando se involucran las armas. La policía ayuda con un problema domestico volátil.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un barrio tranquilo se interrumpe. Un hombre desafortunado trata de ocultar su culpabilidad al tirar unas prendas. Hay puñetazos cuando un dueño de tienda enfrenta a alguien que le robó.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía encuentra más que golosinas en el bolsillo de un sospechoso. Un conductor armado da un relato no creíble para justificar su arma. Una discusión termina con una llamada a Control Animal.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre llama a la policía cuando ve un robo en la licorería. Un conductor pierde a su amiga cuando le roba su camioneta. Los oficiales le sugieren a un joven que sea mejor ejemplo para su hermano.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía evita un allanamiento posiblemente mortal en una casa. Un pasajero tenso empieza a rezongar antes de que los oficiales digan una palabra. La policía busca la bicicleta robada de un joven.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales persiguen a un ciclista casi desnudo por todo el vecindario. Un sospechoso hace una serie de movimientos equivocados frente a su novia. La policía encuentra a una mujer en un armario.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Comedy Club Network

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents

programme.title: Comedy Central Presents
programme.desc: Greg Giraldo gives his no-holds-barred take on disgusting strip clubs, American idiocy and his wife's first pregnancy.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: The Half Hour
programme.desc: Ahmed Bharoocha shares an embarrassing phobia, talks about his problems with religion and technology, and tells a story about his overly supportive father.

programme.title: The Half Hour

programme.desc: Jen Kirkman tries a new brand of jeans, and Kyle Kinane once saw a remarkable intersection of Cheddar Bay Biscuit fans and Michael Jackson fans.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: After Dr. McCoy helps the leader of a planet populated by people with powerful psionic abilities, they decide to force him to stay by torturing his comrades until he submits.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Hyper-accelerated aliens, invisible to the naked eye, take over the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a race of women warriors whose survival depends on symbiotes harvested from Jaffa. Teal'c and SG-1 must convince the warriors' high priestess to put aside her fear of reliance on a life-saving drug before the Goa'uld destroy them.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a very advanced bio-engineered warrior endowed with super strength, created by Anubis. While the team sets out to locate the origin of this new foe, Daniel travels to South America in search of a device left on Earth by the Ancients.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race reaches new heights as teams climb 15,000 feet in the French Alps, and one team may be in jeopardy of elimination after dropping their clue down a mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.desc: When the government accuses an alderman of taking a campaign bribe from a Muslim extremist group, the team reviews hours of wiretap evidence to mount his defense, and Alicia is startled to discover that some of the tapes pertain to her.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: As Alicia races against Louis Canning to round up the most clients for an Erin Brockovich-style class action lawsuit, a mole is detected in the law firm that seems to be working for Canning. Meanwhile, Diane and Will must put their coup on hold.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Will and Diane take on a defamation case from a young Internet billionaire, who is suing the film studio for depicting him in a negative light. Meanwhile, Alicia confronts Will about the message he left on her voice mail.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: River Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready to set sail with Jungle Jack for rolling river adventures from Africa to the Amazon! Rivers provide more than drinking water for wildlife- a river can also be a habitat, a hiding place, and even a runway.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with the ultimate Jack-of-all-trades as he immerses himself in exciting and sometimes dirty jobs caring for animals. A vet's assistant caring for Rhinos, a Bat researcher in South America, working with a King Cobra in Malaysia, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack takes his grandson on an epic Serengeti safari. They witness Cheetahs and Lions on the savannah, Wildebeest, and Zebra starting their annual migration, and visit a local Maasai school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: What could be better than getting up-close animal encounters with wildlife from Africa, Asia, and North America? Doing it all in one place, right here in the ole' US of A!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top of the Pach-yderm
programme.desc: Join Jack for a colossal countdown with the mighty pachyderms! From the biggest land mammal in the world, the African elephant, to Borneo’s pygmy elephant, Jungle Jack is counting down his favorite elephant encounters all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to his home state of Tennessee! He meets a one-of-a-kind farm animal living life to the fullest with a prosthetic leg, and a dedicated caregiver who's helping loads of native species get a second chance.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hair Raising Adventures
programme.desc: Today, Jack is counting down six nerve-wracking adventures that are NOT for the faint of heart. Diving deep underwater in a submarine, trekking into Mandrill country, coming face-to-face with a mountain lion and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack visits the beautiful city of Quito, Ecuador, and the Quito Zoo for an incredible up-close encounter with a Jaguar and its newborn cub, and sees Andean Condor conservation in action.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Born in the U.S.A
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is filled with homegrown adventures, from right here in the ole U. S. of A! Moose, cougars, gators and even an underwater adventure from America’s 50th state!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack makes a heartwarming visit to two unsung animal havens in rural Florida providing good homes for chimpanzees and orangutans and free-ranging lemurs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Camouflage Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he’s counting down ten of his favorite encounters with the masters of camouflage.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family are heading to the quaint Danish town of Solvang, California! Join Jack and Julie as they get down and dirty at Lil Orphan Hammies, an amazing rescue center for pigs of all shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wild Guides
programme.desc: Join Jack on a Wild Countdown safari to South Africa, Peru, Kenya, Borneo, and Namibia with Jack’s favorite guides leading the way to see cheetahs, lions, rhinos, pink dolphins, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to exotic Singapore for an adventure filled with some of the most fascinating creatures in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Seeing is Believing
programme.desc: Today, you’ll see six stories about extraordinary creatures with incredible senses. Some can see their victims from miles away, others navigate in complete darkness, and some even find their victims just by sensing body heat!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen share a boating adventure exploring the animal-rich rainforest surrounding the Panama Canal, including Howler and Capuchin monkeys and the deadly Fer de Lance snake.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: My Better Half
programme.desc: Jack’s wife Suzi – she’s a loving mother, a passionate conservationist, and a fearless adventurer. Come along for encounters with dolphins, elephants, cheetahs and poison dart frogs, just to name a few.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they head into The Wilds of Ohio to visit a 10,000-acre conservation center that's home to over 25 species. They take a closer look at some very unique animals like Szechwan takins, Bactrian camels, rhinos, and even a cheetah!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he samples some cultural delicacies on his way to discovering amazing creatures, like Spider Monkeys, Sloths, Rhinoceros Beetles, Proboscis Monkeys, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along for some epic Hanna family adventures like game ranger training in South Africa, babysitting a wombat in Tasmania, trekking with mandrills in Gabon, a horseback safari through Montana and a trip to meet some donkeys in Arizona!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Central Florida, Jack assists in the release of eight captive-born Whooping Cranes, considered among the rarest and most endangered birds in the world. Jack also goes up in a helicopter for the annual survey of Florida's Bald Eagle population.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Against all Odds
programme.desc: Today, see six special stories of survival. Battling everything from injuries to extinction, meet the amazing creatures that beat the odds.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers some of nature’s most fearsome fangs. Hippos, Rattlesnakes, Baboons, Bats, Lions, and Devils!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores biomes around the world, and the creatures that live there, like Lions, Black Caiman, Tiger Sharks, Tarantulas, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes behind the scenes at the Columbus Zoo, visiting its oldest and newest residents. Then Jack heads to the OSU equine center and goes on rounds with the vet staff before heading to a metro park that is re-introducing a herd of American bison.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wildlife Crime-Fighters
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to the frontlines witnessing conservation and anti-poaching efforts in action around the world all to help save threatened and endangered species. Rhinos, elephants, primates and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is escorting a prisoner to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policeman try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.desc: The receipt of a newspaper that predicts the death, in their presence, of a famed magician, puzzles agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon fear an attempt on President Grant's life while they are escorting him to a San Francisco conference.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Artemus Gordon are summoned to a meeting of Navy officers, only to discover that they have all been murdered.

programme.desc: A master criminal determines to implant a device in President Grant's brain that will make him respond to the criminal's orders.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon get involved with a Croatian king and a werewolf-type who plots to control the King's country.

programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon again meet archfiend Dr. Loveless, who plans to take over arsenal and sub-treasury and become a dictator.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon Set out to recover the stolen U.S. Constitution from a man using it to bargain for control of border territory.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is ordered to block a Canadian revolutionary in his scheme to establish a personal empire by violence.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon upset a conspiracy to assassinate the President of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Inside, the team is busy with floor installation, and the design plans for the master bath are finalized. Outside, a custom pizza oven and fireplace arrive, as well the plants and the new pool cover.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom assists with interior window trim and custom storm windows. Richard checks out an electric meter and panels. Mark follows work on the hardscape. Kevin watches the assembly of a decorative shed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Trees and sod are transplanted with Jenn, while a custom deck hatch is installed to access the basement. Inside, Kevin and Jeff assemble a smart lock system and Tom helps mount a unique range hood.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work happens in the kitchen. Kevin and Tom tackle the molding. The pantry gets a secret door. Countertops, backsplash and tile are installed. A new wood mantle goes around the gas fireplace.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The abandoned Seaside Victorian Cottage is restored to its original beauty. A new addition matches the existing architectural details. New hardscape and landscape anchor it to the corner lot.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The show returns to Dorchester, MA, the home of the first This Old House project, to follow the renovation of a triple decker that burned from illegal fireworks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Asbestos is removed from exposed ductwork. Richard meets the new plumber. Jenn visits a community garden. A local historian speaks about triple deckers. Tom and Charlie pull off the melted siding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The back porches are brought to code. Ice blasting is used to get rid of the fire odor. New vinyl siding gets installed. Homeowner Carol considers new accent colors to match. Framing begins inside.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn creates a patio building team. Heath rewires a section with intact plaster. Charlie and Tom hang a fire rated door. Richard explains how a tub fits in. Kevin and Tom install a replacement window.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom works with new apprentices. Kevin meets them and learns about YouthBuild. Homeowner Carol looks at kitchen cabinets and counters. Richard works with James on separate HVAC systems.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mauro works with the apprentices to fix plaster damage. Richard meets plumber Ronnette about the new sprinkler system. Carol and her sister shop for tile. The glass doors get repaired by an expert.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin reinstall cabinets that survived the fire. Tom teaches apprentices to trim a window. HVAC contractor James shows Richard the plan for hot water. Carol and her sister shop for appliances.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices attend a roofing class and then put their skills to practice. Back at the triple decker, a vinyl floor goes in. Mauro touches up the cabinets. Tom and Charlie install French doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Well over a year and a half since the fire, the triple decker is just about ready for the homeowners to return. Kevin O'Connor checks out what's left to do in all three units, both inside and out.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Illegal fireworks caused a fire in the Dorchester triple decker. Charlie Silva along with local contractors put this house back together. After a long wait, Carol and family can now move back home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Follow the renovation of an 1887 dark, divided two-family home to a bright, open Scandinavian-style one-family, all in a one-episode summer special.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The number of people entering the building trades is declining. This Old House launched the Generation Next initiative to encourage young people to consider the trades as a viable profession.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin, Richard, and Tom follow a family on their journey to restore an abandoned house in Detroit. The city has a program to bring these empty houses back to life, revitalizing the neighborhoods.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: On November 8, 2018 the residents of Paradise woke to a wildfire that would burn many homes and take lives. This Old House follows three families on their emotional ride as they rebuild their homes.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: This 1880 Country Cape started as a small house on a large piece of land but was added onto over time. The crew meets the homeowners and tours both inside and outside to learn about the plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Appliances and radiators are salvaged before the major demolition begins. Outside, an arborist sprays the Hemlock trees to protect from damaging insects. Time to cut off the garage addition.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old foundation gets modified for the new basement. Jenn meets with the landscape designer to discuss the plans for the front yard. On the first floor, Charlie and Tom install a recessed beam.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The foundation is waterproofed. Exterior paint colors are discussed. Homeowner Megan lends a hand turning the new newel posts. Cape style homes are discussed. The foundation is braced for backfilling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old foundation is transitioned to the new. Natural stone is cut into veneers. A new beam is installed on the back dormer for more headroom. Homeowner Megan and her interior designer look at tile.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A Flitch beam is installed. Tree maintenance is performed. A new footing is poured under the kitchen chimney. Sheathing systems are explored. Kevin tours a high-tech sheathing factory in Georgia.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A block wall is constructed to accept the addition framing. The old floor joists are shimmed to make a smooth transition to the new part of the house. The kitchen designer lays out the kitchen.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A bay window is removed and reframed for a new. An old school is being restored into apartments for veterans. The underside of a deck is the "roof" of living space below. Pipe locations are discussed.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Delvin Rodriguez
programme.desc: On October 5th, 2013 Miguel Cotto battled Delvin Rodriguez at the Amway Center in Orlando, Fl. The originally twelve round bout lasted three rounds and ended by technical knockout in third round securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Pedro Campa
programme.desc: On August 13th, 2022, Teofimo Lopez fought Pedro Campa for the NABF & WBO International Super Lightweight Titles in Las Vegas. Teofimo looked confident and quick from the start, wearing down Campa until he finally stopped him in the 7th round.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Julio Cesar Chavez 1
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1996 Oscar De La Hoya and Julio Cesar Chavez fought for the first time for WBC World super Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that ended by technical knockout in the fourth round giving the win to De La Hoya.

programme.title: Devin Haney vs Rafael Vazquez
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Devin Haney and Rafael Vazquez fought eachother at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 4 rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Haney.

programme.title: Artur Beterbiev vs Joe Smith Jr.
programme.desc: On June 18th, 2022 Artur Beterbiev and Joe Smith Jr faced eachother in a battle for IBF, WBC and WBO World Light Heavyweight title at Madison Square Garden that ended by technical knockout in the second round securing the win for Beterbiev.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1994, Roy Jones Jr fought James Toney for the IBF Super Middleweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Jones displayed his exceptional athleticism and speed, outclassing Toney to win a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Giovani Santillan vs Angel Ruiz
programme.desc: On October 15th, 2021 Giovani Santillan and Angel Ruiz fought eachother in a 10 round bout at the Pechanga Arena in San Diego resulting in a victory for Santillan.

programme.title: Roman Gonzalez vs. Juan Francisco Estrada 1
programme.desc: On November 17th, 2012, Roman Gonzalez fought Juan Francisco Estrada for the WBA World Light Flyweight Title at the Sports Arena in Los Angeles. In a successful title defense fight, Gonzalez earned the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Mikaela Mayer vs Maiva Hamadouche
programme.desc: On November 5th, 2021 Mikaela Mayer faced Maiva Hamadouche for the IBF and WBO World Super Featherweight title the 10 round bout ended in a unanimous decision victory for Mayer.

programme.title: Sergio Martinez vs Julio Cesar Chavez Jr
programme.desc: On September 15th, 2012, Sergio Martinez fought Julio Cesar Chavez Jr for the WBC Middleweight Title at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. Despite an incredible effort from Chavez Jr in the final round, Martinez survived and won by decision.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Erik Morales 1
programme.desc: On March 19th, 2005, Erik Morales fought Manny Pacquiao for the WBC and IBA Super Featherweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight that went the distance, Morales got the best of Pacquiao who seemed to have an off-night.

programme.title: Shakur Steveson vs Felix Caraballo
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2020, a young Shakur Stevenson fought Felix Caraballo in a super featherweight bout in The Bubble at MGM Grand. After knocking down Caraballo in rounds 1 and 6, Stevenson would get the KO with a devastating body shot in round six.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Kell Brook
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2020 Terence Crawford battled Kell Brook for the WBO World Welterweight title in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a fourth round technical knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Tommy Morrison
programme.desc: On October 18th, 1991 Ray Mercer faced Tommy Morrison for the WBO World Heavyweight titles at the Convention Center in Atlantic City ending in technical knockout by Mercer earning him the victory and title but, he relinquished the title shortly after.

programme.title: Naoya Inoue vs Nonito Donaire II
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2022 Naoya Inoue battled Nonoito Donaire for a second time at the Super Arena in Saitama for IBF, WBA and WBC World Bantamweight title with Inoue ending the bout in the second round defeating Donaire.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Juan Domingo Roldan
programme.desc: On October 29th, 1987 Thomas Hearns faced Juan Domingo Roldan for the vacant WBC World Middleweight title at the Las Vegas Hilton the 12 round bout went only 4 rounds ending with a knockout by Hearns securing the victory.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
